skill.complextalents.seraphic_echo.desc: Divine Orb: Move the seraphic orb to a target location. Damages and slows enemies, while granting speed and absorption to allies on its path. Cast on the orb itself to pull nearby enemies.
skill.complextalents.shadow_walk.desc: Phase into the shadows to become nearly invisible. Gain increased movement speed and a massive damage bonus on your next strike.
skill.complextalents.blood_pact.desc: Toggle to fuel magic with life force. Grants soul-scaled mana regen and massive power. Phylactery (Death-Defy) is free while active, but dying costs 30% of souls.
skill.complextalents.harmonic_convergenc: Converge your elemental echos to restore mana and supercharge your next spell with increased critical strike chance and damage.
skill.complextalents.challengers_retribu: Adopt a defensive stance, taunting nearby enemies into a magical shield. Release the charge to unleash all absorbed damage in a powerful burst.
